title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reliance Industries - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reliance Industries - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
